scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/engine run build && npm --prefix packages/browser-extension run build && npm --prefix packages/storybook-addon run build && npm --prefix packages/test-components run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/engine run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/browser-extension run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/storybook-addon run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/test-components run typecheck
